name: just-claude-configuration
description: Battle-tested Claude Code configuration for backend projects: guard hooks, session hygiene, memory contour, /feature workflow, self-installing setup skills.

plugins.name: just-claude
plugins.description: Guard hooks with anti-loop denial cap, session hygiene (compaction save/recovery, long-session nudges), memory contour, plan-test-code-review /feature workflow, and /setup-project which adapts everything to your repo (CLAUDE.md generation or merge).
